feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: JSON to AVRO in ABAP Program
entry.content:
Hi Dear SAP friends,

I have a requirement to convert JSON to AVRO in ABAP.

can someone please let me know if you have any idea, Thank you.

entry.title: Show PDF Adobe form in Object Page o from Action routine
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In ABAP Restful, I created an action in the CDS, is it possible for the action to show a PDF - Adobe form file?

or

How to display a PDF - Adobe form in xstring format in an Object Page

Thanks,

entry.title: Mass update a field in Z*table
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to mass update a field in a Z*table that has 20Millions entries.

I am using UPDATE Z*table set + COMMIT WORK while looping in an itab.

I scheduled it as background job which is taking like 6-8 hrs..

Is there any way to make this more faster?

entry.title: Filtering with or does not work on different expressions on unmanaged cds
entry.content:
Hi all! I have a custom cds and I am using it as a searchelp in fiori based on application. I have two expressions in this cds which are 'Business Partner' and 'Business Partner Full Name'. In searchelp I have one search bar that's why I have to send the request like business_partner_full_name,'EN' or business_partner,'EN'  but it doesn't work. There is a method called combine_with_or but I can't use for different expressions. Can you help me if there is a solution or another way that can be done with this class? I'm adding the screenshot of combine_with_or method. Appreciate help from everyone in the community. Thanks a lot!

SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Cannot deploy Fiori Element app to S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi
I'm trying to deploy the Fiori Element application to S/4 Hana Cloud Public Edition
but the deploy cmd failed with the message "You are not authorized to create"

this is my ui5-deploy.yaml and btp destination

*BTP Destination is connected to client Development (080) 

I would like to know What role or authorized objects are required to deploy Fiori App and where to set it.

entry.title: Auto fill reference field INVFO-XBLNR based on purchase document in miro
entry.content: Auto fill reference field INVFO-XBLNR based on purchase document from a custom table using badi or any enhancements in MIRO.Please help. @SAPABAP

entry.title: How to trigger a PPF using web API
entry.content:
Hi members,

How can we trigger a PPF action using web API.

Please provide me if there is a blog or anything related to it.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: Call RAP methods from Control.js
entry.content:
Hello ,

I have an application developed using restful abap where I have few address fields on the object page.

My requirement is to have custom action and by selecting, it should validate the address and give the user a popup with suggested or corrected address. 

Since its not possible to have a popup with RAP itself, I created this custom action button using the guided development in SAP BAS. That created function call which is located in controller.js.

Question is: is there a way I can call my RAP method from controller.js to validate the address when user clicks on the button? 

Appreciate your response

entry.title: Select With Internal Table
entry.content:
hi,

I have to do a Select with an internal table in Inner Join, but I get this error:

 

This is how I build the internal table:

entry.title: Number Range objects
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using number range object in one of my application developed using sap rap in BTP environment.

As soon as I created the number range object, it shows up in ' Manage Number Range Interval' app for me to setup the intervals. But after transporting it to the customer system, I do not see this object in their system.

I checked to make sure I have similar roles in our system and in customer system. Not sure what I am missing.

Appreciate any inputs

entry.title: How can PA2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.
entry.content:
Hi,

All emplyees' IT2001 for one of absent subtype has been replaced with another absent subtype and that have effected the whole payroll for the month.

How can IT2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.

Please Help out in this matter.

How can we remove this replacement with the original absent subtype when we are not sure for each employee which subtype has been replaced with a specific absent subtype.

It means Replaced Leave Subtype is unknown and with which it is replaced is known.

Now, need to correct that Info Type 2001 for all employees, so that the Payroll can be matched with the Simulation that generated earlier to this change.

How, can I retrieve History of IT2001 and then how can I replace the effected Subtype?

entry.title: Issue missing home page for a specific persona in the SAP2405 + missing some notes from 2405
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
@dudejas , @syam_yalamati 

Currently, we are accessing the SAP Service Asset Manager 2405 application within the S/4HANA(Version - 2022) and kyma environment. We can access the application through our credential but After the initial sync was successfully completed, we are encountering a missing home screen issue. We are unable to view the Home Page.

However We tried implementing notes(3398187) into SSAM2405, but it is not relevant for our system and states that it cannot be implemented. This could be due to the status of our S4HANA 2022 system, as it has S4FND SP level 0000.

I have attached the log screenshots for your reference

Could please provide some insights or suggestions to resolve this issue?





Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  

@syam_yalamati , @dudejas

entry.title: SAP Learning path for a candidate with technical development background
entry.content:
Greetings Everyone!!! I am exploring a career around SAP technologies. I do have development backgound of middleware and database technologies using C# and JAVA, cloud, perfromance engineering, management with close to over all 18+ years of experience. I would like to get some suggestions from SAP community and also if anyone made a move switching to SAp from traditional application/services developement.

I am looking for infights on what't the best course to make a switch and what do you suggest to start with, focus  more and get hands-on experience or get trained on and suggested certifications on SAP modules. I would like to focus more on technology rathar than functional.

Appreciate your insights and more importantly your time.

Have a great weekend

Mohan

entry.title: Use CDS custom entity as data source/association for other views
entry.content:
Hello Community!

We built a custom cds root entity which gets its data from a remote client proxy. Now we want to use this custom entity as a data source for other views or as association/join in other views. Every approach I tried failed so far - is there any solution to that?

Use custom entity as data source:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_CustomEntity

 

 Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity in join statement:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1 join I_CustomEntity ....

 

Error: Entity "I_CustomEntity" cannot be used as the data source

Use custom entity as association:

 

define view entity I_Entity2
  as select from I_Entity1

  association [1] to I_CustomEntity as _Custom ...
{
  _Custom.Field1
}

 

Error: Target of association _Custom cannot be an abstract/custom entity

entry.title: Default Line Items on Object Page SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

I am working on an SAP RAP project and developing a multi-line edit app. The app consists of a parent entity, where the "Version" field serves as the key. This parent entity is displayed on the List Page. Additionally, I have a child entity that uses version and one other field as key. This child entity is displayed on the Object Page.

 

My Requirement is to display three default line items on the object page after the user clicks the Create button on the List Page. 

Any advice or suggestions on how to implement this would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thank You!

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Is there a way to filter with additional binding fields with empty value in Value Help
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to implement an 'Old Status' dropdown list and a 'New Status' dropdown list.
The 'New Status' is dependent on 'Old Status'.
If the 'Old Status' is empty, the 'New Status' should be empty.
I have added the following annotations, it works for the 'Old Status' with a non-empty value, but doesn't work with 'Old Status' with an empty value.

I have tried with value help with parameters, but it doesn't work, the parameters can not be bounded in Fiori elements by rap CDS.

Is there a way to filter the empty value?

entry.title: BTP-"Error during fetching the JWT Token Keys. Please check your network and HTTPS proxy settings."
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a standard BTP ABAP Instance. 

Im successfully able to login to the instance url while directed from the Eclipse ADT during addition of cloud project.

Post this when i close this browser, i'm facing the below error in eclipse

Please help with this.

PS: Other colleague of mine is able to login and instantiate the cloud project successfully without any error.

Also im the administrator and developer of this BTP instance.

entry.title: How to Trigger a PPF action to Print Handling unit label from fiori/API
entry.content:
Hi members,

My requirement is a web API where we need to trigger a PPF to Print Handling Unit Label and to create a spool for each request that is processed and also, we need to have the reprint option also.

Please let me know how I can achieve it and if you can share anything related references.

Thanks,
Bharath

entry.title: OData services not available in VSCODE
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

i got a weird problem when creating a Fiori Elements application for an OData V4 service on a BTP ABAP instance via the Open Fiori Generator.

While i can see my OData services in BAS and so create the Fiori Elements application, i get a "Services unavailable" in VSCODE.

 

BAS works fine

Open Fiori Generator does not find anything

But before, when creating the destination in VSCODE via service key, i saw all (a lot more than my 3) services (i assume released APIs?). When i do the "Open Environment Check" in VSCODE, i see my 3 services. 

Adding system via service keys shows a lot of services

My three servics are shown in the result of the Environment Check


Does anybody have a clue? Seems like IDE can access, but Open Generator not?

Best regards,

Robert

EDIT: Put pictures into post instead of adding attachments

entry.title: Error while activating the Define Statutory report
entry.content:
Dears,

We are implementing statutory reports for India, as per the information provided in note#3443920, we have uploaded attachment YY1_IN_AUDIT_Definition.But while activating it, system throwing error as shown below.

Error: CREATIONDATE not found in database view or table I_PURCHASEORDERITEM

Can anyone suggest on this?

Thanks in advance
